landing.title: Build a schedule with zero conflicts.
landing.description: Search the course catalog, find what fits, and make every semester fall into place.

search.label: Search by course code, name, or description

error.title: Search is temporarily unavailable.
error.detail: Please try again in a moment.

empty.title: No courses found.
empty.detail: Try a different code or a broader course name.

notFound.title: We couldn't find that course.
notFound.detail: Check the course code or return to search.

courseDetail.descriptionFallback: A course description is not available yet.

eligibility.title: Check your eligibility.
eligibility.description: Enter the courses you have completed and your current study cycle.
eligibility.error: Eligibility could not be checked right now. Please try again.

stats.title: Know what to expect.
stats.description: Historical performance and enrollment, stated simply.

reviews.title: Reviews from the classroom.
reviews.description: Experiences shared by students who have taken this course.
reviews.emptyTitle: No reviews yet. Be the first to share your experience.
reviews.leaveReviewDescription: Share a concise, useful note for the next student.
reviews.success: Thank you. Your review was submitted.
reviews.error: Your review could not be submitted. Please try again.

hero.title: See your week before it happens.
hero.description: Add up to six courses, choose a session, and explore available section combinations.

builder.title: Build your course list
builder.description: Search by course code or name. The backend supports a maximum of six courses.

empty.title: Your week starts here.
empty.detail: Add a course above to begin building your schedule.

ready.title: Ready when you are.
ready.detail: Generate a schedule to see available section combinations.

error.title: Schedules are temporarily unavailable.
error.detail: Check the session and try again in a moment.

noOptions.title: No schedule options found.
noOptions.detail: One or more courses may not have sections in this session. Try another session or course selection.

courseSelector.descriptionFallback: No course description is available yet.
